Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Special Economic Measures Act
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Special Economic Measures Act

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Special Economic Measures Act to change that Act√¢¬Ä¬ôs long title to √¢¬Ä¬úAn Act to provide for the imposition of economic measures against a person, an entity or a foreign state for grave breaches of international peace and security, gross and systematic human rights violations or acts of significant corruption√¢¬Ä¬ù and its short title to the √¢¬Ä¬úSergei Magnitsky Global Sanctions Act√¢¬Ä¬ù.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The long title of the Special Economic Measures Act is replaced by the following:

Provision.Text: An Act to provide for the imposition of economic measures against a person, an entity or a foreign state for grave breaches of international peace and security, gross and systematic human rights violations or acts of significant corruption

Section.Text: Section 1 of the Act is replaced by the following:
This Act may be cited as the Sergei Magnitsky Global Sanctions Act.

Section.MarginalNote: Replacement of √¢¬Ä¬úSpecial Economic Measures Act√¢¬Ä¬ù in other Acts
Section.Text: Every reference to the √¢¬Ä¬úSpecial Economic Measures Act√¢¬Ä¬ù is replaced by a reference to the √¢¬Ä¬úSergei Magnitsky Global Sanctions Act√¢¬Ä¬ù in the following provisions:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 13(3)(d) of the Seized Property Management Act;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 11.11(1)(b.1) of the Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 35(1)(d) of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act;

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 6(2)(d) of the International Interests in Mobile Equipment (aircraft equipment) Act;

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 20(1) of the Freezing Assets of Corrupt Foreign Officials Act; and

Paragraph.Label: (f)
Paragraph.Text: in the Justice for Victims of Corrupt Foreign Officials Act (Sergei Magnitsky Law):

Section.Text: Every reference to the √¢¬Ä¬úSpecial Economic Measures Act√¢¬Ä¬ù is replaced by a reference to the √¢¬Ä¬úSergei Magnitsky Global Sanctions Act√¢¬Ä¬ù in the following provisions:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 15(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Burma) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 10(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Zimbabwe) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 10(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Iran) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (d)
Paragraph.Text: in the Regulations Implementing the United Nations Resolutions and Imposing Special Economic Measures on Libya:

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 6(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Syria) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (f)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 4(1)(c) of the General Export Permit No. 45 √¢¬Ä¬î Cryptography for the Development or Production of a Product;

Paragraph.Label: (g)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 3(1)(c) of the General Export Permit No. 46 √¢¬Ä¬î Cryptography for Use by Certain Consignees;

Paragraph.Label: (h)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (i)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Ukraine) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (j)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (South Sudan) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (k)
Paragraph.Text: paragraph 3(1)(c) of the General Export Permit No. 41 √¢¬Ä¬î Dual-use Goods and Technology to Certain Destinations;

Paragraph.Label: (l)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Venezuela) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (m)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Nicaragua) Regulations;

Paragraph.Label: (n)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (Belarus) Regulations; and

Paragraph.Label: (o)
Paragraph.Text: subsection 7(2) of the Special Economic Measures (People√¢¬Ä¬ôs Republic of China) Regulations.
